examples: When will they bring out the next version?
The photo brings out the colors.
The dress brings out her eyes.
The interview brought out her personality.
The brand brought out a limited edition.
The spice brings out the flavor.
The crisis brought out the best in him.
The company brought out a new product.
The publisher brought out her first novel.
They brought out the album last year.
example_translate: Они выпустили альбом в прошлом году.
bring out.synonyms:
Выпускать (продукт, книгу) - release, publish, launch
Выявлять, подчёркивать (качество) - highlight, emphasize, reveal
